summary: Completed testing for iteration 16: Payout Schedule Selector feature. Backend accepts payout_schedule field (triday/biweekly/monthly) without 422 errors. Frontend Step 4 shows 3 radio-card payout options with fees (10%, 8%, 4%). Old terms checkbox removed. All tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register accepts payout_schedule='biweekly' - returns 200 with correct value
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register accepts payout_schedule='triday' - returns 200 with correct value
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register accepts payout_schedule=null when requires_deposit=false
Frontend: /business/register Step 4 loads correctly with radio-card selector
Frontend: Commission block (data-testid='commission-info-block') hidden by default when 'No requiero anticipo' is selected
Frontend: OLD 'Acepto los Términos de Servicio... 8%' checkbox is REMOVED
Frontend: Commission block visible when 'Requiero anticipo' is selected
Frontend: All 3 payout options visible (payout-triday, payout-biweekly, payout-monthly) with correct fees (10%, 8%, 4%)
Frontend: Default payout_schedule is 'monthly' (4%) - has coral border highlight
Frontend: Help icon (data-testid='help-payout-schedule') exists for payout schedule popover
Frontend: Clicking payout options changes selection with coral border highlight
Frontend: Home page (/) loads correctly with hero section and search
Frontend: Search page (/search) loads correctly with filters and business listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested the payout schedule radio-card selector. Key data-testids: commission-info-block (visible only when option-with-deposit is selected), payout-triday (10%), payout-biweekly (8%), payout-monthly (4% - default), help-payout-schedule. The old terms checkbox 'Acepto los Términos de Servicio...(8%)' has been successfully removed. payout_schedule field is stored in DB only when requires_deposit=true, otherwise null. App URL: https://reserve-stripe-test.preview.emergentagent.com
